summary: Complete testing of ManoProtect redesigned homepage and Employee Portal. Backend 18/18 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional including director login, dashboard stats, employee listing, and invitation creation with role-based access control. Fixed session cookie issue in backend/frontend.
verified_features: Landing Page - Hero section with 'Protege a tu familia de estafas digitales' headline - WORKING
Landing Page - CTAs: 'Empezar Gratis', 'Ver Dispositivo SOS' - WORKING
Landing Page - Trust indicators: '7 días gratis', 'Sin tarjeta', 'Cancela cuando quieras' - WORKING
Landing Page - Features Grid with 5 feature cards (SOS, Anti-Phishing, AI Voice Shield, Localizador, Modo Familiar) - WORKING
Landing Page - SOS Product Showcase with GRATIS pricing - WORKING
Employee Portal - Login page at /empleados/login - WORKING
Employee Portal - Director login with director@manoprotect.com / Director2026! - WORKING
Employee Portal - Dashboard with tabs (Resumen, Empleados, Invitaciones, Pedidos) - WORKING
Employee Portal - Stats cards: Usuarios Totales, Usuarios Premium, Pedidos Totales, Pedidos Pendientes - WORKING
Employee Portal - Director-only stats: Empleados Activos, Invitaciones Pendientes, Amenazas Detectadas - WORKING
Employee Portal - Employees list with status badges (Activo/Inactivo, Role) - WORKING
Employee Portal - Create invitation form (director only) - WORKING
Employee Portal - Invitation shows temp_password and registration_url (MOCKED email) - WORKING
Employee Portal - Regular employee blocked from creating invitations (403 Forbidden) - WORKING
Employee Portal - Regular employee blocked from listing all employees (403 Forbidden) - WORKING
Employee Portal - Employee registration via invite token - WORKING
API /api/employee-portal/login - Returns session_token and sets cookie - WORKING
API /api/employee-portal/dashboard/stats - Returns stats based on role - WORKING
API /api/employee-portal/invites - POST creates invitation (director only) - WORKING
API /api/employee-portal/invites - GET lists invitations (director only) - WORKING
API /api/employee-portal/employees - GET lists employees (director only) - WORKING
API /api/employee-portal/register - POST registers employee via token - WORKING
API /api/employee-portal/verify-invite/{token} - GET verifies token validity - WORKING

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Login endpoint was not setting session cookie, only returning token in body
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added response.set_cookie() to set session_token cookie with proper attributes (httponly, secure, samesite=none)

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Frontend was trying to set Cookie header manually in fetch requests which browsers don't allow
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Removed invalid 'Cookie' header from fetch requests, relying on credentials: 'include' to send cookies automatically

critical_code_review_comments: Session management now properly uses HTTP-only cookies for security
Role-based access control (RBAC) working correctly - director vs employee permissions enforced
Landing page redesign is clean and professional with good visual hierarchy
Employee Portal has proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Test employees created during testing with prefix 'TEST_'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Employee Portal fully functional with cookie-based session management. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_employee_portal.py covers all CRUD operations and authorization checks. Landing page redesign complete with modular components in /app/frontend/src/components/landing/

mocked_apis_list: SendGrid email notifications - temp_password and registration_url shown in UI instead of being sent via email. Note: 'En producción, estas credenciales se enviarán por email'
